app.name: Arka Finance
app.tagline: Money you understand. Wealth that compounds.

nav.babylonRuleBody: Save at least 10% of every paycheck before any other expense.

dashboard.savingsTrendSub: How much stayed in the treasury each month.

health.title: Financial Health Score
health.subtitle: How your habits compound over time.
health.criticalDesc: Urgent attention: spending significantly exceeds savings.
health.poorDesc: Some red flags — Arkad would suggest trimming expenses first.
health.fairDesc: You're stable but not yet building wealth at a steady pace.
health.goodDesc: Healthy habits — a few adjustments will compound nicely.
health.excellentDesc: World-class habits. Arkad would toast you at the House of Lenders.

income.title: Income
income.description: Every stream of money flowing into your treasury.
income.emptyDesc: Add your first paycheck, gig payment or dividend to start tracking.
income.formDesc: Money flowing in — whether salary, side hustle or dividends.

expenses.title: Expenses
expenses.description: Track every outflow — and spot where your money leaks.
expenses.noMatchDesc: Clear your filters or log a new expense.
expenses.formDesc: Capture every purchase — awareness is the first law.

budgets.title: Budgets
budgets.description: Allocate a monthly ceiling to each category — and stick to it.
budgets.emptyDesc: Create your first category budget — Arka will warn you before you overspend.
budgets.formDesc: Control your expenses — the second law of Arkad.

goals.title: Financial goals
goals.description: Turn wishes into plans — Arka calculates the monthly saving needed.
goals.emptyDesc: Setting a concrete goal is the fastest way to start saving.
goals.formDesc: Dream big — then break it down into a monthly plan.

subscriptions.title: Subscriptions
subscriptions.description: Every recurring charge — so you stay in control of silent spend.
subscriptions.candidatesDesc: Arka spotted recurring charges in your expenses. Add the ones you'd like to track.
subscriptions.emptyDesc: Log your streaming, SaaS and memberships to see the true cost.
subscriptions.formDesc: Keep tabs on every recurring charge.

insights.title: Financial insights
insights.description: Patterns, nudges and signals Arka surfaces from your activity.
insights.topCategoriesDesc: Where the most money flowed over time.

reports.title: Reports
reports.description: A six-month snapshot of your treasury — and CSV exports when you need them.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Tailor Arka to your household, your currency and your style.
settings.name: Name
settings.currencyDesc: Amounts are stored in {base} and converted for display using live FX rates.
settings.lastUpdated: Last updated {ago}. Source: exchangerate.host · offline fallback table.
settings.appearanceDesc: Dark mode is persisted via cookies.
settings.darkModeDesc: Reduce eye strain for late-night budgeting.
settings.followSystemDesc: Match whatever your OS is set to.
settings.languageDesc: Choose the language used across the interface.
settings.dangerZoneDesc: Locally stored data can be cleared at any time.

cookies.title: Cookies & privacy
cookies.body: Arka stores small cookies to remember your theme, language and consent — nothing is shared with third parties.

auth.welcomeBackDesc: Sign in to continue building your Arka.
auth.createArkaDesc: Start building wealth with Babylonian wisdom.
auth.resetDesc: Enter the email on file and we'll send a secure reset link.
